sourcesContent:
# Closure rows: postfix while/until, typeof/delete/instanceof,
# the bare `...` expansion marker, and indexed pattern loop variables —
# the gaps judged cheap enough to close together.
x = 0
x += 1 while x < 5
x -= 1 until x is 2

t1 = typeof x
t2 = typeof {}
obj = a: 1, b: 2
deleted = delete obj.a
key = "b"
delete obj[key]
t3 = typeof obj.a

class Tool
  kind: -> "tool"
tool = new Tool
i1 = tool instanceof Tool
i2 = {} instanceof Tool

# Relations as operands group (silent-miscompile class caught in
# note: without parens `(a instanceof b) + 1` re-associates).
g1 = (tool instanceof Tool) + 1
g2 = not (tool instanceof Tool)
g3 = ("a" in {a: 1}) && true
g4 = 1 + typeof g3
g5 = typeof typeof g1

pickEnds = (first, ..., last) -> [first, last]
ends = pickEnds 1, 2, 3, 4
lastOf = (..., z) -> z
l1 = lastOf 7, 8, 9

pairSum = 0
idxSum = 0
for [a, b], i in [[1, 2], [3, 4]]
  pairSum += a * b
  idxSum += i

src = a: 1, b: 2
doubled = {k: v * 2 for k, v of src}
vals = (v for k, v of src)

hex = 0xff
big = 1_000_000
sci = 2.5e-3

# Object-method values (certification addendum N1): thin arrows emit
# ES6 method shorthand; fat arrows stay arrows.
api = {base: 10, add: (n) -> @base + n, tag: (s) => "t:" + s}
sum10 = api.add(5)
tagged = api.tag "x"

bits = 5 & 3
bits |= 8
bits ^= 1
shifted = bits << 2 >> 1
flipped = ~bits & 0xff
lanes = 1 | 2 & 6 ^ 4
